description_long: This is a compact quadcopter drone with a sleek, angular body and four extended arms, each supporting a single rotor with two blades. The main chassis is streamlined and appears to house internal electronics, with a small camera module mounted at the front underside. The rotors are attached to the ends of the arms via visible motor housings, and the arms are slightly angled for stability. The landing gear consists of four short, fixed legs positioned beneath each arm, providing ground clearance for the body and camera. The surface finish is predominantly matte black, with subtle metallic and plastic details visible at the joints and motor mounts. The overall design suggests a lightweight, portable drone suitable for aerial photography or surveillance in urban environments.
description: A sleek, matte black quadcopter drone with four rotors, fixed landing legs, and a front-mounted camera. The body is compact and angular, with visible motor housings and subtle metallic accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the camera module beneath the main body and the symmetrical arrangement of the four rotors.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the drone's slim profile, fixed landing legs, and the arm structure supporting the rotors.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the drone's body and the even spacing of the rotors and arms.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, similar to view 1, but from the other side, showing the landing legs and rotor configuration.
